title: Application
description: A complete IIS web application resource. Applications belong to a single web site and handle requests at a specific virtual path.

location.description: The full location path combining the web site name and application path.

path.description: The virtual path of the application relative to the web site root.

id.description: The unique identifier of the application.

physical_path.description: The physical file system path for the application.

enabled_protocols.description: The protocols enabled for this application, as a comma-separated list.
